law_text_amended: House Law-1 as stated (docs/next/design/DDC.md §1.2: 'no kernel vector ever enters the model' — what crosses into a model is text, the model's own activations, or vectors through a trained bridge; the raw-foreign-coordinates cell is empty).
amendment_verbatim: Kernel-derived content vectors may enter model activations ONLY within the KaE track, only via the registered splice, with the deflator ladder of §2.6 mandatory.

scope.track: KaE (Kernel-as-Expert) ONLY — experiment f1k and registered KaE variants; every other track remains under unamended Law-1
scope.mechanism: the registered moe() ADD splice ONLY (gate-0 artifact poc/glm52-probe/kae-patch-draft/kae-add-path.patch sha256 11f8b45884878111480192ee086c92b22acaa1aaf3238b2d46c47f952e9dd9cb on colibri a78a06fc5acc4b0dc0f9ef03987c66b0559d1250); no other write path into activations is licensed
scope.mandatory_discipline: the ASM-2029/2036 deflator ladder (d0 placebo / d1-drng derangements / d2 dictionary knull / d3-text bridge) is mandatory on every KaE run; REVISION-6 makes K-1/K-2/K-3 co-primary (ASM-2370)
scope.does_not_license: raw foreign coordinates anywhere else, other models, other engines, or any standing repeal of Law-1 — this is a scoped exception, not a rewrite

basis: ASM-2025 (KaE LAW-1 INTERACTION): Law-1 as stated PROHIBITS KaE's carrier, which writes into the residual stream; F1-K therefore requires an explicit, scoped, REGISTERED Law-1 amendment BEFORE any run — 'the maintainer's scope-expansion instruction signals intent but is not the amendment; the amendment is MAINTAINER GATE 0 and must be a registry event.' Amendment text verbatim from docs/next/design/glm52-followup-experiment.md §2.2 (MAINTAINER GATE 0).
authorized_by: MAINTAINER GATE 0 GO on the reduced-cost approach, kernel-of-truth issue #28 (carried as a STIPULATED n_planned assumption in the frozen f1k record: 'MAINTAINER GATE 0 (Law-1 scoped amendment + the KaE patch) and GATE 1 (plan + ceilings) are GO'd … per kernel-of-truth #28'). The GO approves the amendment's content; THIS record is the explicit registry event ASM-2025 requires.
author: writer-2
binding: This record becomes the registered amendment when the coordinator lands it (append-never-edit; the landing commit is the registry event and its timestamp witness). It resolves the GPT-5.6 pre-run review-gate RUN-HOLD item 3 (Law-1 outstanding) and the f1k-freeze-readiness.md A.4 checklist item. Companion register entry: ASM-2378.
expiry: Stands while the f1k record (and registered KaE successors citing this event) stand; a KaE-track kill (f1k kill_criterion_verbatim harm rule) suspends the licence pending maintainer redesign review.
non_retroactivity: No frozen record, verdict, results-log line, or certificate changes. No run has occurred under KaE (results-log/f1k.jsonl does not exist at this event).
